title: Automatic coffee stirring cup electric magnetic cup (Silver ash)
description:
About this item
1. Magnetic self-stirring technology small magnet design. A magnet device built into the bottom of the cup drives the magnet rod to stir the drink at high speed. Automatic mixing, save time and effort.
2. Magnetic adsorption charging, just connect the cup with the included USB cable to any USB port without a battery, it can be charged in 3 hours, with a long battery life of 120 cups.
3. One key open the lid, easy to operate since the stirring cup, rapid stirring at the same time rapid heat dissipation, to solve the urgent need for water, sealed lid can reduce the wine leakage when stirring, non-slip cup bottom. Simple operation can be opened with one hand and one key.
4. Wide aperture mouth design, easy to clean, not easy to hide dirt, easy to drink. Removable design for easy cleaning. The magnetic mixer at the bottom of the cup can be quickly removed and put back in for easy cleaning, but do not use a dishwasher or fully soak to clean.
5. This cup is made of food-grade ABS plastic material and high-quality stainless steel to ensure years of leak-free and safe mixing, making it safe for drinking. Can be the perfect gift, a lovely cup, a lovely gift. For office, travel, Father's Day, Mother's Day, Christmas, etc.
